meaning: vt.使膨胀,详述,扩张vi.张开,发展
examples: We have to expand the size of the image.
It was just a passing comment, he didn't expand.
We've been given the nod to expand the business.
In 2015, we can expect the role of technology in the workplace to expand.
Andy is looking to expand operations and recently scouted out plants on the East Coast.
